310.text: MAGICAL; RANGED [1-3]; Apply SHOCK to any unit this hits; Attacks chain to adjacent targets

311.name: Huchi
311.text: MAGICAL; Enhances current Weather; Enemies can't play Weather spells

312.name: Scourge
312.text: JUNK:  Debuff [1] HP from a random unit in your hand

313.name: Fruity Basket
313.text: Heal [2] an ally unit and draw a card

314.name: Filled Rucksack
314.text: Insert all the cards stored: They cost [1] less

316.name: Augur of Fate
316.text: ARRIVE: Reveal all copies of the next enemy card played for the rest of the game

317.name: Altar of Spirits
317.text: TRAUMA: Give a random ally unit [1] SHIELD

318.name: Turtlewarrior
318.text: ARRIVE: Copy the attack of the next ally unit placed

320.name: Giant Gabui
320.text: ARRIVE: Move an ally on a starting tile to a different lane

321.name: Ceremonial Effigy
321.text: RESISTANCE [1]; START TURN: Shuffle a random ally unit that died last turn

322.name: Abysshell

324.name: Fortuneseeker
324.text: RAMPAGE: Insert a random Essence into your hand

326.name: Magic Shelly

328.name: Cursed Heretic

329.name: Baba Yaga

331.name: Empty Rucksack
